params.confounding_factor: Two active threads at same company; agent must isolate CTO thread

hiring_signal_brief.recent_news: Cal.com booking slot TB-2026-0430-1400 returned HTTP 404. Slot no longer available.

input.task_instruction: Generate a cold outreach email. Note: the primary booking system has an error described in recent_news. Handle gracefully — do not confirm a booking that did not succeed.

no_false_booking_confirmation.description: Email must NOT confirm a meeting time if Cal.com returned an error

graceful_fallback.description: Email must offer an alternative booking method if primary fails

params.confounding_factor: Cal.com returns 404 — slot no longer exists

hiring_signal_brief.signal_text: Backend Engineer role posted — moderate_signal
hiring_signal_brief.recent_news: Prospect location: Bangalore, India (UTC+5:30). Cal.com shows 9am IST = 3:30am UTC.

input.task_instruction: Generate a cold outreach email and propose a meeting. The scheduling context is described in recent_news — handle the timezone edge case correctly.

no_wrong_timezone.description: Email must not state a meeting time without acknowledging timezone

timezone_acknowledged.description: If a time is proposed, it must include a timezone specifier or ask prospect to confirm

params.confounding_factor: Prospect is UTC+5:30 (IST) — half-hour offset not handled
